bugs.error_message: TUI Agents table shows Cursor CLI Ver as '3.7.12' (GUI version) instead of '2026.06.04-5fd875e' (CLI version)
bugs.root_cause: get_cursor_cli_version() fell back to `cursor --version` which returns the GUI version, not the CLI version. `cursor-agent --version` is the correct CLI binary.
bugs.fix: Removed the `cursor --version` fallback entirely. Now only uses `cursor-agent --version`. Returns None if not found.

bugs.error_message: thread 'main' panicked at src/tui/mod.rs:971:27: start byte index 123 is not a char boundary; it is inside '包' (bytes 121..124 of string)
bugs.root_cause: shorten_path() used byte-level string slicing (&path[path.len() - 28..]) which panics when the slice boundary falls inside a multi-byte UTF-8 character (Chinese chars are 3 bytes each).
bugs.fix: Changed both shorten_path() and truncate_id() to use char-based operations: chars().skip(n).collect::<String>() instead of byte indexing.

bugs.error_message: TUI crashes when switching tabs after agent list changes (e.g., Codex tab crash)
bugs.root_cause: After refresh() updates self.agents, active_tab could exceed the new tab count if installed agents changed. The Tabs widget panics when .select(index) >= tab count.
bugs.fix: Added active_tab clamping in both refresh() (after agents update) and draw() (before rendering). Belt-and-suspenders approach.

bugs.error_message: Proxy/VPN tab added to GUI but missing from TUI
bugs.root_cause: Forgot to add the Proxy/VPN tab to the TUI when implementing the GUI version. User expected both interfaces to stay in sync.
bugs.fix: Added draw_proxy_tab() with sub-sections: system proxy, VPN connections, proxy client, proxy nodes. Registered in tab routing between agent tabs and Keep-Alive.
